Contact Us
Commander, Naval Air Warfare Center Aircraft Division
22347 Cedar Point Road
Building 2185, Suite 3250
Patuxent River, MD 20670-5304
General/Directory Information
Phone: 888-292-5919 Option 5
Email:
nav_helpdesk.fct@navy.mil
NAVAIR Help Desk and Engineering Support
The NAVAIR Warfighter Response Center Help Desk is focused on connecting U.S. Navy users with technical experts for aviation-related inquiries.
Phone: 888-292-5919 Option 5
Email:
nav_helpdesk.fct@navy.mil
Human Resources/Equal Employment Opportunity
HR General Phone: 301-342-6685
EEO General Phone: 301-995-4328
Civilian Employment Verification: 800-367-5690
Employees can find the NAWCAD EEO Policy and Reasonable Accommodation statements internally at:
https://myteam.navair.navy.mil/ad/73/734/EEOProcessPolicyDocs/SitePages/Home.aspx
All others should contact NAWCAD's EEO office directly.
Business Inquiries and Technology Transfer
Email: TTO@us.navy.mil
Noise Abatement
Command flight operations have the potential to elevate noise that may affect people living in the vicinity. Programs to minimize noise impact include:
An established real estate disclosure clause notifying prospective buyers in the area of potential impacts from nearby military installations,
coordinated efforts with local planning and zoning commissions to address development in areas impacted by flight operations, and
the Noise Abatement Hotline for reporting of noise disturbances.
The Noise Abatement Hotline is staffed by a command representative Monday through Friday during business hours.
Noise Abatement Hotline: 866-819-9028
Email:
paxnoise@navy.mil
